summary: Phase 4 Part 2 File Sharing System - All tests PASSED (12 backend + 10 frontend verifications). File sharing toggle, download tracking, portal shared files, and portal file download endpoints all working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Backend: PATCH /api/files/:fileId/share - toggle sharing ON (returns 200, sets sharedWithClient=true, sharedAt timestamp)
2. Backend: PATCH /api/files/:fileId/share - toggle sharing OFF (returns 200, sets sharedWithClient=false, sharedAt=null)
3. Backend: PATCH /api/files/:fileId/share - requires authentication (returns 401/403 without auth)
4. Backend: PATCH /api/files/:fileId/share - returns 404 for non-existent file
5. Backend: PATCH /api/files/:fileId/track-download - track download count (returns 200, increments downloadCount)
6. Backend: PATCH /api/files/:fileId/track-download - handles invalid file ID
7. Backend: GET /api/portal/:token - includes only shared files in response (files where sharedWithClient=true)
8. Backend: GET /api/portal/:token - returns 400/404 for invalid token
9. Backend: GET /api/portal/:token/files/:fileId/download - redirects to file URL for shared files (302)
10. Backend: GET /api/portal/:token/files/:fileId/download - returns 404 for non-shared files
11. Backend: GET /api/portal/:token/files/:fileId/download - returns 404 for invalid file ID
12. Frontend: Login and open lead 'Emmanuel - Art exhibition photography', navigate to Files tab
13. Frontend: File gallery visible (data-testid='file-gallery') with file cards
14. Frontend: Share toggle button visible on file hover (data-testid='share-toggle-{fileId}')
15. Frontend: Share toggle shows 'Shared' or 'Private' text based on state
16. Frontend: Click share toggle changes state from 'Shared' to 'Private' and vice versa
17. Frontend: Shared badge appears on file card when file is shared (data-testid='shared-badge-{fileId}')
18. Frontend: Client portal at /portal/:token loads correctly
19. Frontend: Shared files section visible on portal (data-testid='shared-files-section')
20. Frontend: Download button visible for each shared file (data-testid='download-file-{fileId}')
21. Frontend: Download link has correct href format: /api/portal/:token/files/:fileId/download
critical_code_review_comments: File sharing toggle endpoint properly implemented with ownership verification
Track download endpoint is public (no auth required) for client portal usage
Portal API correctly filters to only include files where sharedWithClient=true
Portal download endpoint verifies file belongs to lead AND is shared before redirecting
Frontend share toggle properly updates UI state and shows Shared/Private badge
Client portal correctly renders shared files section with download buttons
Download links use correct API format for portal file downloads
seed_data_creation: None - used existing lead and file data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Part 2 File Sharing fully tested. File b21f5da1-4856-402a-b647-23d0ed7017f8 (1.PNG) is currently shared. Portal at /portal/qix2u3mijnq0ncf9ycx48br shows shared files section. Share toggle in LeadDetailModal Files tab works correctly. Download tracking increments downloadCount in database.

GET /api/portal/:token/files/:fileId/dow.validates: file belongs to lead AND sharedWithClient=true
GET /api/portal/:token/files/:fileId/dow.returns_404: File not found or not shared

ClientPortal_SharedFilesSection.location: Below activity timeline, above contact section
ClientPortal_SharedFilesSection.heading: Shared Files
